name: Clone LinkedIn Writing Styles with AI Analysis & Prompt Generation to Airtable
description:
Boost Your Content Speed & Grow Authority in Your LinkedIn Space 

Are you tired of spending HOURS crafting the perfect LinkedIn posts? This revolutionary n8n workflow is changing the game for content creators, marketing agencies, and business leaders worldwide.

WHAT MAKES THIS TOOL A GAME-CHANGER 

The LinkedIn Style Extractor & Prompt Generator uses cutting-edge AI technology to analyze ANY LinkedIn profile, extract their unique writing fingerprint, and create custom AI prompts that perfectly replicate their style. Stop struggling with content creation - start publishing high-converting posts in minutes!

PREMIUM FEATURES

✅ Advanced LinkedIn Profile Mining*: Extracts *ALL public posts from any LinkedIn profile with one click
✅ AI Style Recognition Technology**: Our proprietary algorithm detects unique writing patterns, emotional triggers, persuasion techniques, and engagement hooks that make their content viral
✅ Custom Prompt Engineering**: Creates pixel-perfect system prompts that force ANY AI to write exactly like your target influencer - their tone, structure, hooks, and signature style
✅ Seamless Airtable Integration**: Automatically organizes and saves all your generated prompts in your Airtable database for instant access

THREE SIMPLE STEPS TO CONTENT MASTERY

ENTER ANY LINKEDIN PROFILE - Just paste a URL or username into our simple form
WAIT 60 SECONDS - Our AI engine analyzes hundreds of data points to extract the exact writing formula
GET YOUR CUSTOM PROMPT - Use it with ChatGPT, Claude, or any AI to instantly create content that sounds exactly like them

WHO NEEDS THIS TOOL? EVERYONE WHO WANTS TO WIN ON LINKEDIN! 

Marketing Agencies**: Create client content 10X faster while maintaining their exact voice and style
Business Owners**: Clone your top competitor's writing style and beat them at their own game
Content Creators**: Analyze viral influencers in your niche and adapt their winning formulas
LinkedIn Coaches**: Scale your content creation while maintaining your authentic voice
Personal Brands**: Ensure consistent messaging across your entire content ecosystem

EASY SETUP - READY IN MINUTES 

You'll need:

Apify account (free tier works for testing)
OpenRouter account (for accessing premium AI models)
Airtable account (free tier supports up to 1,200 prompt records!)

SETUP IN UNDER 5 MINUTES 

Import the workflow into your n8n instance with one click
Connect your accounts with our guided setup wizard:
   Apify API Key
   OpenRouter API Key
   Airtable API Key
Customize your storage with our pre-built Airtable template
START EXTRACTING STYLES and creating viral content immediately!

INSIDER TIPS FOR MAXIMUM ROI 

Analyze Top Performers**: Target LinkedIn creators with high engagement rates (we recommend at least 10-15 posts)
Master Multiple Styles**: Create a library of different writing styles for different content purposes

Content Multiplier**: One style prompt can generate HUNDREDS of perfectly matched posts

ADVANCED STRATEGY: Analyze profiles in your niche with the highest conversion rates (not just likes!)

COMPLETELY ETHICAL & TOS-COMPLIANT 

This workflow only accesses publicly available LinkedIn content. We've designed it to respect LinkedIn's Terms of Service while giving you the competitive edge you need. Use this powerful tool to ethically scale your content creation.

Need a hand with automation? Let’s connect on X! 👉 https://x.com/TBR0007
